Tests for C standard library functions in math, printf, string, and time categories.

## Folders
- **[math](math/README.md)**: Tests for C standard library math functions (`floor`, `log`, `pow`, `round`) and a build script.
- **[printf](printf/README.md)**: Tests for `snprintf` and build script for testing `vsprintf.c` with `clar`.
- **[string](string/README.md)**: Tests for various string and character functions in the C standard library using the Clar framework.
- **[time](time/README.md)**: Tests for the `strftime` function and build script for time-related components.
